# TokenRemapProvider

Rewrite theme token path references in RenderProgram instruction sequences mapping old token paths to new ones so that theme switching becomes a pure instruction rewrite over the program

## Commands

### register
Return static metadata for PluginRegistry . 
 name : TokenRemapProvider 
 kind : token-remap 
 capabilities : [ token-path-rewrite , theme-switching ]

### apply
Walk the instruction sequence and rewrite token path references 
 per the mappings in spec . Instructions with tag token have their 
 path field remapped if it appears in the mapping . Non token 
 instructions pass through unchanged . Returns the new serialized 
 program and the updated list of applied transforms .

**Arguments:** `$0` **program** (string), `$1` **spec** (string)
